title: neorautanenia orbicularis
intro: Neorautanenia orbicularis, also known as the African snake flower, is a plant species native to southern Africa, characterized by its striking yellow and red flowers. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Neorautanenia orbicularis include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health conditions.
